\NormalTok{perc\_variance.v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{perc\_variance.v,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{eigenvalues.constituent }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
\AttributeTok{PC =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(eigenvalues.v),}
\AttributeTok{Eigenvalue =}\NormalTok{ eigenvalues.v,}
\AttributeTok{Variance =}\NormalTok{ perc\_variance.v,}
\AttributeTok{Cumulative =}\NormalTok{ cumulative\_perc\_var.v)}

\NormalTok{eigenvalues.constituent}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\#making a table of the phthalates and what pCA groups they\textquotesingle{}re in for easy results}
\NormalTok{loadings }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(pca.constituent}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{rotation[, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{])}
\NormalTok{pca\_groups }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ loadings }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Constituent =} \FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(loadings),}
    \AttributeTok{max\_loading =} \FunctionTok{apply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(loadings), }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, max),}
    \AttributeTok{PC\_group =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(loadings)[}\FunctionTok{max.col}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(loadings))])}\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{PC\_group =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(max\_loading }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Weak"}\NormalTok{, PC\_group))}


 

\CommentTok{\# Now associating PCA exposure categories with our selected health symptoms }
\NormalTok{pca\_scores }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(pca.constituent}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{x)}
\NormalTok{pca\_scores\_3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pca\_scores[, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]}

\NormalTok{merged\_pca\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(phthalates\_scaled, pca\_scores\_3)}
\NormalTok{merged\_pca\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged\_pca\_df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(merged\_pca\_df, demo)}

\FunctionTok{glimpse}\NormalTok{(merged\_pca\_df)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Step 2: Factor Analysis

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{fa\_3.oblique }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fa}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  phthalates\_scaled,}
  \AttributeTok{nfactors =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{rotate =} \StringTok{"promax"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{scores =} \StringTok{"regression"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{fm =} \StringTok{"ml"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{fa\_3.oblique}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Now taking factor group membership and seeing how its
associated with reproductive health outcomes by running regression
models}\label{now-taking-factor-group-membership-and-seeing-how-its-associated-with-reproductive-health-outcomes-by-running-regression-models}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\#renaming groups}
\NormalTok{scores }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(fa\_3.oblique}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{scores)}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(scores) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"F1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"F2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"F3"}\NormalTok{)}
